## Blueprint Checklist

If adding a new blueprint, confirm all required files are included:

- [ ] `README.md` with metadata table, description, and prerequisites
- [ ] `BLUEPRINT.md` with complete step-by-step tutorial
- [ ] `prompts/` directory with numbered AI prompt files
- [ ] `starter-code/` with skeleton files (not the finished code)
- [ ] All internal links in README and BLUEPRINT work correctly
- [ ] Commercial value estimate is included
- [ ] Difficulty level and build time are specified
